snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Tell us in the comments — is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

Lyrics - Mayur Puri
Composer - Pritam
Director - Anees Bazmee
Producer - Vipul Amrutlal Shah

Teri Ore Lyrics:

Dil kho gaya ho gaya kisi ka,
abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Aankhon mein hai khaab sa kisi
ka, abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Rishta naya rabba, dil chhu raha hai
Kheenche mujhe koyi dor teri ore
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

khulti fizayen khulti ghataye
sar pe naya hai aasmaan
Chaaro dishaaye haske bulaaye,
kyon sab huye hai meherbaan
Ha humane to yahi rabba
kasam se pata hai
Dil pe nahi koyi jor koyi jor
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

Ek heer thi aur tha ek ranjha,
kehate hai mere gaanv mein
Saccha ho dil to sau muskilon
ho, jhukata naseeba pau main
Ho ho aanchal tera rabba
falak ban gaya hai
Aab iska nahi koyi oor koyi chhor
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)
Dil kho gaya ho gaya kisi ka,
abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Aankhon mein hai khaab sa kisi
ka, abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Rishta naya rabba, dil chhu raha hai
Kheenche mujhe koyi dor teri ore
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2

de-DE.title: Teri Ore (Liedtext-Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Liebeslied
de-DE.description:
Spüre die Magie der Liebe mit „Teri Ore“, einem Liebeslied aus „Singh Is Kinng“ 💖✨

Mit dem unvergesslichen Bollywood-Traumpaar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif, bekannt für ihre unglaubliche Leinwandchemie, fängt dieser romantische Song die Essenz der Liebe wunderschön ein. Gesungen von Rahat Fateh Ali Khan und Shreya Ghoshal, mit Musik von Pritam, zählt „Teri Ore“ zu den beliebtesten Bollywood-Liebesliedern.

Dieses zeitlose Hindi-Liebeslied ist bekannt für seine sanfte Melodie, die gefühlvollen Texte und die unvergesslichen Bilder. Ob verliebt oder einfach nur ein Fan klassischer Bollywood-Musik – „Teri Ore“ schafft eine tiefe emotionale Verbindung, die lange anhält. 💫

Das legendäre Paar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif strahlt im gesamten Song. Um mehr von ihrer magischen Chemie zu erleben, solltest du dir auch die Songs aus „Welcome“ sowie weitere Hits aus „Singh Is Kinng“ wie „Jee Karda“, „Talli Hua“ und „Bhootni Ke“ anhören. 🎶

💬 Verratet uns in den Kommentaren: Ist das euer liebster romantischer Bollywood-Song?

pt-BR.title: Teri Ore (vídeo lírico) | Singh é rei | Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Canção de amor
pt-BR.description:
Sinta a magia do amor com Teri Ore, uma canção romântica de Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Estrelada pela dupla icônica de Bollywood, Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif, conhecidos por sua incrível química em cena, esta canção romântica captura lindamente a essência do amor. Cantada por Rahat Fateh Ali Khan e Shreya Ghoshal, com música de Pritam, Teri Ore continua sendo uma das canções de amor mais amadas de Bollywood.

Esta canção romântica hindi atemporal é conhecida por sua melodia suave, letra emocionante e visuais inesquecíveis. Seja você apaixonado ou simplesmente um apreciador da música clássica de Bollywood, Teri Ore cria uma conexão emocional profunda que permanece com você. 💫

A dupla icônica de Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif brilha ao longo da música. Para apreciar ainda mais a química mágica deles, não perca as músicas de Welcome, além de outros sucessos de Singh Is Kinng, como Jee Karda, Talli Hua e Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Conte para nós nos comentários: essa é a sua música romântica favorita de Bollywood?

hi.description:
'सिंह इज़ किंग' के प्रेम गीत 'तेरी ओर' के साथ प्यार के जादू को महसूस करें 💖✨

अत्यंत लोकप्रिय बॉलीवुड जोड़ी अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की इस रोमांटिक फिल्म में, जो अपनी बेमिसाल केमिस्ट्री के लिए जाने जाते हैं, प्यार का सार खूबसूरती से बयां किया गया है। राहत फतेह अली खान और श्रेया घोषाल द्वारा गाए गए और प्रीतम द्वारा संगीतबद्ध किए गए 'तेरी ओर' आज भी बॉलीवुड के सबसे प्रिय प्रेम गीतों में से एक है।

यह सदाबहार हिंदी रोमांटिक गीत अपनी मधुर धुन, दिल को छू लेने वाले बोल और अविस्मरणीय दृश्यों के लिए जाना जाता है। चाहे आप प्यार में हों या सिर्फ क्लासिकल बॉलीवुड संगीत के शौकीन हों, 'तेरी ओर' एक गहरा भावनात्मक जुड़ाव पैदा करता है जो हमेशा आपके साथ रहता है। 💫

अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की यह प्रतिष्ठित जोड़ी पूरे गाने में चमकती है। उनकी जादुई केमिस्ट्री का और आनंद लेने के लिए, 'वेलकम' के गानों के साथ-साथ 'सिंह इज़ किंग' के अन्य हिट गाने जैसे 'जी करदा', 'तल्ली हुआ' और 'भूतनी के' देखना न भूलें। 🎶

💬 हमें कमेंट्स में बताएं — क्या यह आपका पसंदीदा रोमांटिक बॉलीवुड गाना है?

id.title: Teri Ore (Video Lirik) | Singh Adalah Raja | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Lagu Cinta
id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. 💫

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Beri tahu kami di kolom komentar — apakah ini lagu Bollywood romantis favoritmu?

en.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
en.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Tell us in the comments — is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Teaser) | Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
Samay sab kuch badal deta hai…
par patiyon ki fitrat uske bhi bas mein nahi 😬

Aa rahe hain Prajapati Pandey…
is baar apni Patni aur Woh Do ke saath! 😉

Presenting the Official Teaser of Pati Patni Aur Woh Do Starring Ayushmann Khurrana , Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi ,Rakul Preet Singh,Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
A legacy that built Swarajya. A story that shaped history. 🚩

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.


Raja Shivaji in cinemas on 1st May 2026.
Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Written, Produced, Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music By: Ajay – Atul
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)
In Cinemas 1st May
A Jio Studios Release
 
Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production Designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX
 
Jio Studios Team:
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
 
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu
 
#RajaShivajiTrailer #RiteishDeshmukh #SanjayDutt, #AbhishekBachchan, #VidyaBalan, #SachinKhedekar, #Bhagyashree, #FardeenKhan, #JitendraJoshi, #AmoleGupte, #BomanIrani, #JyotiDeshpande, #GeneliaDeshmukh, #AjayAtul #RemoDsouza

हम दुनिया के पहले प्लेयर्स हैं जिन्होंने 50,000 दिन के इस 'बिल्ड' का टूर किया है! एन्जॉय करें! :)

अभी पूरे देश के क्रोगर स्टोर्स पर जाकर नए फीस्टेबल्स पैंट्री पैक्स ढूंढें! https://feastables.com/pages/find-a-store

नया मर्चेंडाइज़ - https://mrbeast.store/
हमारे डिस्कॉर्ड सर्वर से जुड़ो और पाओ मौका आने वाले माइनक्राफ्ट चैलेंजेस में भाग लेने का!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming
संगीत https://www.extrememusic.com द्वारा प्रदान किया गया है
----------------------------------------------------------------
इन सभी पर फॉलो करो वरना मैं किक कर दूंगा
• फेसबुक - https://www.facebook.com/MrBeast/
• ट्विटर - https://twitter.com/MrBeast
• इंस्टाग्राम - https://www.instagram.com/mrbeast
----------------------------------------------------------------

th.title: ชาเลนจ์การสร้างใน 1 วัน vs 50,000 วัน
th.description:
พวกเราเป็นผู้เล่นกลุ่มแรกที่ได้เยี่ยมชมเกมเวอร์ชั่น 50,000 วัน! ขอให้สนุกให้เต็มที่ :)

ไปหาแพ็คสุดพิเศษ Feastables Pantry Packs ใหม่ได้แล้ววันนี้ที่ร้าน Kroger ทั่วประเทศ!　https://feastables.com/pages/find-a-store

สินค้าใหม่ - https://mrbeast.store
มาเข้าร่วมเซิร์ฟเวอร์ Discord ของเราเพื่อลุ้นโอกาสแข่งขัน Minecraft ชาเลนจ์ในอนาคต!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming
เพลงประกอบโดย https://www.extrememusic.com
----------------------------------------------------------------
กดติดตามทั้งหมดนี้ด้วย ไม่งั้นคุณโดนผมเตะ
• Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/MrBeast/
• Twitter - https://twitter.com/MrBeast
• Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/mrbeast
--------------------------------------------------------------------

en.title: 1 Day vs 50,000 Day Build Challenge
en.description:
We were the first players to ever tour the 50,000 day build! Enjoy :)

Go find the new Feastables Pantry Packs right now at Kroger stores nationwide! https://feastables.com/pages/find-a-store

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

snippet.title: Ek Mutthi Baadal। New Movie Official Trailer 2026। Aanchal Sharma, Nisha Sharma, Usha Rajak
snippet.description:
EK MUTTHI BADAL | NEW NEPALI MOVIE OFFICIAL TRAILER 2026| 2083 

AS A WEDDING APPROACHES, THE WHOLE FAMILY GATHERS, BABA, AAMA, DIDI, BAHINI, FUPU, CARRYING YEARS OF LOVE, SILENCE, AND EXPECTATION. BUT AN UNEXPECTED INCIDENT THREATENS TO SHAKE THE ENTIRE FAMILY. EK MUTTHI BADAL EXPLORES WHAT IT MEANS TO BE PART OF A FAMILY, WHAT IT MEANS TO LEAVE HOME, AND HOW ONE FINDS THEIR PLACE IN A CHANGING WORLD.

IN CINEMAS FROM MAY 15, 2026 (JESTHA 1).
AANCHAL SHARMA, NISHA SHARMA, USHA RAJAK, SAHAYOG ADHIKARI, SEKHAR CHAPAGAIN, MANISH NIRAULA, ABIRAL PRATAP ADHIKARI, GAURAV BISTA, BHIMA MAINALI, ASMITA GAUTAM 

A Film by Sahara Sharma
Gauthali Entertainment, Mana Production Presents
 In Co-production with Third Culture Kids, Chromosom Films
Produced with the financial support of the Hubert Bals Fund + Europe Programme of International Film Festival Rotterdam
Supported by White Light Studio Co. Ltd.
 Film Bazaar India
 Film Development Board, Government of Nepal

snippet.title: इकरार हो ना जाए | Zinda Dil | Udit Narayan Songs | Abbas | Ashima Bhalla
snippet.description:
2000 के दशक के सुनहरे दौर से, पेश है उदित नारायण की आवाज़ में प्यार और भावनाओं से भरी एक खूबसूरत प्रस्तुति - "इकरार हो ना जाए"! यह गाना हमें उस दौर की याद दिलाता है जब संगीत में सादगी और गहराई हुआ करती थी। उदित जी की आवाज़ में जो दर्द और मिठास है, वह हर सुनने वाले के दिल को छू जाती है।



Credits :

Song: Ikrar Ho Na Jaye
Album: Zinda Dil
Artist: Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

O ho ho ey hey hey
Iqaraar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
Hey hey hey.. Hey hey hey hey


Saagar ki maujein hain
Khulaa aasmaan hai
Dhadkan deevaani hai
Dilkash samaa hai
Dhadkan deevaani hai
Dilkash samaa hai
Khvaabon ke hamsafar
Kaa deedaar ho na jaaye
Khvaabon ke hamsafar
Kaa deedaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho ho ho ho
Hey hey hey.. Hey hey hey hey


Jee chaahe lahron se
Karoon main sharaarat
Inko bataa doon main
Mere dil ki chaahat
Inko bataa doon main
Mere dil ki chaahat
Koi deevaanaa meraa
Dildaar ho na jaaye
Koi deevaanaa meraa
Dildaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
Iqaraar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
Hey hey hey.. Ey hey hey
O ho ho ey hey hey.

इस गाने में प्यार की कशिश और इजहार की मासूमियत को बड़ी खूबसूरती से दर्शाया गया है। यह उन लोगों के लिए एक तोहफा है जो आज भी सच्चे प्यार में विश्वास रखते हैं। इस गाने को सुनकर आप निश्चित रूप से अपने पुराने दिनों में खो जाएंगे और प्यार के रंग में रंग जाएंगे।

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

संगीत का जादू हमेशा बना रहे… #UditNarayan #HindiSongs #RomanticSongs #2000sMusic #LoveSongs #Bollywood


#UditNarayan #HindiSongs #RomanticSongs #2000sHindiMusic #LoveSongs #IndianMusic #Bollywood #BollywoodSongs #IkrarHoNaJaye #ZindaDil #SentimentalSongs #SadSongs #MelodiousSongs #KumarSanu #AlkaYagnik #SonuNigam #ShreyaGhoshal #LataMangeshkar #KishoreKumar #BestOfUditNarayan #ClassicHindiSongs #OldHindiSongs #2000sBollywood #HeartTouchingSongs #IndianLoveSongs #HindiLoveSongs #UditNarayanHits    #2000

snippet.description:
Pardesiya ye Sach hai Piya | 90s Filmy Gaane | Evergreen Hits  song | Geet yug

#hindisong 

Pardesiya ye Sach hai Piya | 90s  | Old Hindi Romantic Song | Heart Touching 90s-2000s Vibe Love Song 
Step back into the golden era of Bollywood with “Pardesiya ye Sach hai Piya | 90s”, a soul-stirring romantic track inspired by the timeless melody style of the 1990s–2000s Hindi songs. This beautiful love song captures the essence of old-school romance, soothing vocals, and vintage musical charm that will touch your heart instantly.
Relive the nostalgia of retro Bollywood music with emotional lyrics, classic melodies, and a warm vintage feel  perfect for those who love old Hindi romantic songs and evergreen love stories.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Connect with #StreetFighterMovie online:
Website: https://www.streetfightermovie.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightermovie/
X: https://x.com/Street_fighter
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/StreetfighterMovie/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@streetfightermovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@streetfightermovie

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

snippet.title: 🔴 [HINDI] TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring | Grand Finals - Champion Rush
snippet.description:
12 Teams. One Champion 🏆
Welcome to the TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring GRAND FINALS!
📍 Live from Mahatma Mandir Convention & Exhibition Centre, Gandhinagar
Day 2: First team to 80 points activates Champion Rush! Any team who wins a Booyah! after activating Champion Rush will become CHAMPIONS of TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring

Fighting their way through the Group and Knockout Stages, these are 12 teams that have made it to the GRAND FINALS:
- GODS REIGN PROS
- IQOO TOTAL GAMING
- IQOO OGXTSG
- GODLIKE ESPORTS
- AEROBOTZ ESPORTS
- REVENANT XSPARK
- TEAM HIND
- RNX ESPORTS
- RECKONING ESPORTS
- GG INSTINCT
- GYAN GAMING
- FIREEYES GAMING

🗓️ Grand Finals Schedule:
Day 1 - Point Rush 📅 April 25 | 🕑 2:00 PM IST onwards
Day 2 - CHAMPION RUSH 📅 April 26 | 🕑 2:00 PM IST onwards

Are you ready to FEEL THE FIRE? 🔥

#FFMIC2026 #FreeFire #FreeFireMAX #TEZ #FFMIC #FeelTheFire

snippet.title: Bangles (Official #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | बांगडी
snippet.description:
|| 🕉 ||
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod

snippet.title: Tujh sang preet lagai sajana💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई सजना Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​
snippet.description:
💖 Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 💖

Is khoobsurat gaane “Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna” mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai ❤️ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua ho… chahe wo milan ho ya judai 💔

🎶 Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.
Tujh sang preet lagai sajana 🎶💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई बालमा Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
⏬ Download / Stream: 
https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ

⚡️ Banjaare:
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare

⚡️ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

📷 Photo:
https://unsplash.com

🚫 If you want to use this music in your video you will need permission from the artist or label.

#Banjaare #Bairan #SpedSlowChaos #SpeedUp #SpedUp #Slowed #SlowedReverb #Music #Vocals #Lyrics #LyricVideo #TopHits #Hits

snippet.title: Bluesss & Friends - Yabi The Goat / Hidney Manchhe Ladchha / Episode 3
snippet.description:
Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.

Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.


Episode 003

“Hidney Maanchhe Ladchha” is a Nepali idiom that simply means “a person who walks, falls", signifying that failure is a natural part of the journey towards success. YABI immediately contrasts this idea, emphasizing that while falling is inevitable, he is bound to get back up and keep racing towards his dreams. Like the idiom, he didn’t just walk- he ran through the pitfalls his mom warned him about and these obstacles have shaped his journey and helped him to get to where he is now, “carrying the industry on his shoulders”.

Follow all of Bluesss and Friends Releases Here: https://bluesssandfriends.com 

Stream The HQ Audio Here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/hidnemancheladcha-ytg.bio

All Audio Links: https://ffm.bio/bluesss

Song: Saajan Saajan
Movie: Dil Ka Rishta 
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu, Sapna Awasthi
Music Director : Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew :
Producer : Tips Films, Shabbir Boxwala, Aditya Rai
Director : Naresh Malhotra
Cast : Arjun Rampal, Aishwarya Rai, Priyanshu, Raakhee

Song Lyrics :

Maine Maana Ke Pyaar Ki Had Hoti Hai 
Haan Maine Maana Ke Intezar Ki Had Hoti Hai
Maine Maana Ke Dil Dhadakta Hai Sirf Tere Liye
Maine Maana Ke Ikraar Ki Had Hoti Hai
Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Kitne Deewanee Ho Gayi Main Kuch Samajh Na Aaya 
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
Ishq Mein Jeena Hai Ishq Mein Marna Hai
Ishq Bina Ab To Kuch Nahin Karna Hai
Duniya Waalo Se Ab Nahin Darna Hai
Mere Dil Ki Har Dhadkan Mein Ishq Samaya
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

Ishq Nahin Aasaan Ishq Bada Mushkil
Ishq Ke Raahi Ko Milti Nahi Manzil
Ishq Mein Kuch Bhi To Hota Nahin Haasil
Ishq Hai Kya Is Ishq Ko Koyi Samajh Na Paya
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Kitne Deewanee Ho Gayi Main Kuch Samajh Na Aaya
(Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER III - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #LF #A1 #313 #DRS
snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER III 

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE esports tournaments in South Asia is here. 

Top teams from Pakistan 🇵🇰, Bangladesh 🇧🇩, and Nepal 🇳🇵 enter the battlefield to face an intense multi day grind filled with strategy, rotations, and highpressure fights.

Over 4 days, squads will battle across multiple matches where every elimination, every rotation, and every decision can change the standings.

Expect clutch moments, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves. 

Only one team will rise…
and claim the Ultimate Grind title.

THE GRIND BEGINS NOW. 🔥

🏆 PARTICIPATING TEAMS

🇵🇰 4THRIVES
🇳🇵 Horaa Esports
🇳🇵 DRS Gaming
🇵🇰 ASI8 Esports
🇧🇩 A1 RG Esports
🇧🇩 ZC GSM Esports
🇳🇵 T2K Esports
🇵🇰 Koxav Tribe
🇵🇰 Loyalty First
🇵🇰 313 Esports
🇵🇰 Seventh Element
🇧🇩 CMF Esports
🇵🇰 XOTICS Esports
🇵🇰 Red Saints
🇳🇵 Abrupt Slayers
🇧🇩 Galactic Spirit

⏰ MATCH START TIME

🇵🇰 Pakistan 03:30 PM
🇳🇵 Nepal  04:15 PM
🇧🇩 Bangladesh 04:30 PM

📅 TOURNAMENT SCHEDULE
📆 April 27 to April 30, 2026
👥 16 Teams
🎮 6 Matches Per Day
📺 24 Total Matches

💬 JOIN THE COMMUNITY
https://discord.gg/JH8qB8Qyt

Share your predictions - Who will win? 
Support your favorite teams and enjoy elite PUBG MOBILE esports.

📲 FOLLOW 141 ESPORTS
https://www.instagram.com/esports141official

👍 Like the stream
🔔 Subscribe for more PUBG MOBILE content
https://youtube.com/@Official141esports

📢 Turn on notifications for upcoming tournaments

⚠️ DISCLAIMER
All visuals, overlays, and commentary are created for entertainment and community esports purposes.

📜 COPYRIGHT NOTICE

THE BATTLE BEGINS… ARE YOU READY?

snippet.title: श्यामा आन बसों वृन्दावन मे | Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
श्यामा आन बसों वृन्दावन मे | Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein | Official Music Video | Sanatan Music

Feel the sweetness of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition of “Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein” — a heartfelt bhajan calling Shri Krishna (Shyama) to reside within our heart, our home, and our life with divine grace.

This devotional bhajan is perfect for morning puja, meditation, evening aarti, satsang, or quiet moments of reflection. Let the name of Shyama fill your mind with calmness and your heart with devotion.

✨ Why listen to this bhajan:
• Brings peace, positivity, and Vrindavan bhakti vibes
• Ideal for meditation, naam-jap, and daily spiritual routine
• Helps reduce stress, anxiety, and overthinking through devotion
• Creates a soothing devotional atmosphere at home

🎧 Close your eyes and imagine Vrindavan — where every breath feels like a prayer and every moment feels close to Radha-Krishna.
🙏 If this bhajan touched your soul, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more devotional music and peaceful mantras.

🎥 VISUALS & POST-PRODUCTION
The visual experience in this video has been significantly edited, color-graded, and animated by our post-production team to enhance your meditative immersion.
• Visual Note: This video features originally edited visuals and animated sequences. Certain visual elements are utilized under Fair Use for transformative educational and spiritual purposes to enhance the meditative experience.
• Video Animation: Animaginate Studios
• Editing & VFX: Done in-house by Sanatan Music
• Guided Chant-Along Feature: Includes professionally synchronized on-screen lyrics.


🔐 Copyright Notice
© Sanatan Music. All rights reserved.
This is an original devotional composition produced and licensed by Sanatan Music. Unauthorized re-upload or use is strictly prohibited.

℗ Sanatan Music

en.description:
श्यामा आन बसों वृन्दावन मे | Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein | Official Music Video | Sanatan Music

Feel the sweetness of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition of “Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein” — a heartfelt bhajan calling Shri Krishna (Shyama) to reside within our heart, our home, and our life with divine grace.

This devotional bhajan is perfect for morning puja, meditation, evening aarti, satsang, or quiet moments of reflection. Let the name of Shyama fill your mind with calmness and your heart with devotion.

✨ Why listen to this bhajan:
• Brings peace, positivity, and Vrindavan bhakti vibes
• Ideal for meditation, naam-jap, and daily spiritual routine
• Helps reduce stress, anxiety, and overthinking through devotion
• Creates a soothing devotional atmosphere at home

🎧 Close your eyes and imagine Vrindavan — where every breath feels like a prayer and every moment feels close to Radha-Krishna.
🙏 If this bhajan touched your soul, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more devotional music and peaceful mantras.

🎥 VISUALS & POST-PRODUCTION
The visual experience in this video has been significantly edited, color-graded, and animated by our post-production team to enhance your meditative immersion.
• Visual Note: This video features originally edited visuals and animated sequences. Certain visual elements are utilized under Fair Use for transformative educational and spiritual purposes to enhance the meditative experience.
• Video Animation: Animaginate Studios

• Guided Chant-Along Feature: Includes professionally synchronized on-screen lyrics.

snippet.title: Manai Man Ma | मनै मनमा | New Nepali DJ Dancing Song | Aagyat | Official Music Video |
snippet.description:
Aagyat Presents: New Nepali Dj Dancing Song

#manaimanma #nepalisong #nepalimusic #nepalidancingsong #nepalidjremixsong #nepalidj #nepalidjsong #nepalifilmsong #officialsong #nepalilokgeet #nepaliviralsong #nepaligeet #newtrendingsong 
#aagyat #NepaliSong #NepaliDJ #NepaliMusic #NepaliLoveSong
#NepaliTrending #NepaliDance #DJMusic #RomanticSong
#NepaliVideo #NepaliTikTok #ViralNepali #LoveSong
#NepaliCouple #DJRemix #MusicVideo #OfficialMusicVideo
#NepalMusic #TrendingNow #DanceSong #himalayanvibes 
#newsong
--------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Manai manma…
Manai manma…

Ya ta tuna layeu ki…
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Timile mero mutu choyau chupchap
Manai manma… manai manma…
Maya basyo… thahai nabhai

Manai manma socheko kurani
Jhattai thaha pauchau ho kasari
Bhana timile… bhana timile
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile

Hey… Hey…
Hands up…
Manai manma…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Body move gara… side to side
Manai manma… manai manma…

Uff furti her
Lau her furti her
Timi jasto hajarau pachi chan
Furti nadekhau
Timile furti nadekhau
Nakkale ketale maya nabolau

Timi najik huda mutu dhadkincha
Malai pani kina yesto lagcha
Shayad yo nai maya ho…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Manai manma… manai manma…
Move your body nonstop
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryau timile

Manai manma…
Manai manma…
🎶 Audio Credits:

♬ Song:- 
Manai Man Ma मनै मनमा

♬ Vocal:-
Aagyat

♬ Lyrics: 
Sujan Koirala
Ramesh Luitel

©️ Aagyat, 2026

snippet.title: Can AI Make Free Fire Hacks?
snippet.description:
#freefireviralshortsvideo  #garenaWhat really happens if AI tries to make Free Fire H@cks? 😳🔥

In this video, I tested whether AI can actually create Free Fire hacks or if it’s just another myth. From generated scripts to unexpected results, I explored everything so YOU don’t have to.

Some outputs look convincing, some don’t even work, and some can be risky for your account. So before you believe anything like this, watch the video and see the real results.

⚠️ DISCLAIMER:
This video is made for educational and entertainment purposes only. I do NOT support hacking, cheating, or using any third-party tools in Free Fire. The purpose of this video is to test and expose these ideas and show the risks involved, including possible account bans. Always play fair and follow Free Fire’s rules.

If you enjoyed the video, make sure to LIKE 👍  
Comment what you think about AI in gaming 👇  
And SUBSCRIBE for more Free Fire experiments and challenges!

📲 Instagram: @krishgaming.creator  
📩 Business: krishgaming.collab@gmail.com

#freefire #freefireindia #gamingexperiment #ai #freefireviral #garenafreefireindia

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: KITAB (Official Music video) | Mr Dutt ft Vipin Foji | Tanu Rawat | New Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened.  join Mr Dutt  for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song KITAB
MAKE YOUR REELS : https://url-shortener.me/I440


Listen on : 
Spotify : https://url-shortener.me/I43P



AUDIO CREDITS:
SONG : KITAB 
SINGER : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI
LYRICS & COMPOSE : VARUN GARHWALA , MR DUTT
MUSIC & MISX MASTER : MR DUTT

 FEMALE LEAD : TANU RAWAT 
REEL PROMOTIONS: SHARP MEDIA

YT Promotion - BIGMedia 

Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer
1st Ad - Jass
Editor - cutsbynav
Colorist - Fateh Sidhu
Vfx - Gags 3D
Female lead - Tanu Rawat
Production Head = Kainth Production (Gagan)
Production ad = Ravi Birla
Himachal production- Sunny 
Makeup = Komal Makeover
Hair = Sunny Lakhanpal
Still = J singh
Spot Team - Ram and Team

Tanu Rawat Team 
Anjali Rawat and Team

Transport - Nijjar Group
Art - Karma 
Costume - Rajat Manchanda
Costume Ad - Neha and Fahem

lyrics : 
Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki 
Ya Tane Mumtaj Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai beth Gya Tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 

Ho Pucche na Tu Mere Te Ya Ashiq ka Haal Resham Te Jyada Hai Sunehre Tere Baal 
Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
Can’t lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu 
Maine Mai Ghanshyam Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To Pkka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki


#kitab #mrdutt

snippet.description:

Red Chillies Entertainment and Excel Entertainment Present
An Excel Entertainment Production.

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC

Directed by - Rahul Dholakia

Electric Guitars: Pawan Rasaily

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Hi from the beginning

What a fool, O cruel one, O cruel one

Your eyes are charming, your words are charming

I've been in love for a hundred years

My heart has been lost ever since

Your beauty was a symbol

Your every beat is you

Why should such a heart flutter

O cruel one, O cruel one

Your innocence is in my breath

You hide it, hide it...

Why should I express my love

You too should say it sometime, say it...

I will surely know

Your every excuse was yours

It started with you
It ended with you

My love story was a fairy tale

You are the flame, so remember

I too am a paradise
O cruel one, O Zaalima..

See you after meeting me
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tell me why I call you so mean..

snippet.title: तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में | Aap To Aise Na The | Mohammed Rafi Songs | Om Shivpuri
snippet.description:
मोहम्मद रफ़ी साहब, एक ऐसी आवाज़ जो आज भी हमारे दिलों में बसी है। उनकी आवाज़ में एक दर्द है, एक प्यार है, जो सीधे दिल को छू जाता है। 80 के दशक के उनके रोमांटिक गाने आज भी हर प्यार करने वाले की पसंद हैं। 'तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में' एक ऐसा ही नगमा है, जो प्यार की गहराई को बयां करता है। रफ़ी साहब के गाये इस गाने में प्यार की मासूमियत, विरह की पीड़ा और मिलन की आस छुपी हुई है। यह गाना हमें उस दौर में ले जाता है जब प्यार इज़हार करने के लिए शब्दों की ज़रूरत नहीं होती थी, बस आँखों ही आँखों में सब कुछ कह दिया जाता था।


Credits :

Song: Tu Is Tarah Se Mere Zindagi Main
Album: Aap To Aise Na The
Artist: Mohammed Rafi
Music Director: Usha Khanna
Lyricist: Nida Fazli 


ऐसे ही और भी कई गाने हैं रफ़ी साहब के, जो आज भी हमें सुकून देते हैं और प्यार की याद दिलाते हैं। उनकी आवाज़ में एक जादू है, जो हमें हमेशा के लिए उनका दीवाना बना देता है। आइए, इस खूबसूरत गाने को सुनें और रफ़ी साहब की आवाज़ के जादू में खो जाएं।

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया हो, तो इसे लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
Check out our Playlist:
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1oJZ98sB3FbQAbrZkEbdtQ?si=_xvuL7hdQlu_oQySAWsv2A

Stream Now/Download:

🎤Letra:
[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f***ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out; Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' s*** you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f**ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Oeh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈

BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community.

Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya

snippet.title: Måneskin - Beggin' (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Måneskin - Beggin' (Lyrics)
Get:

Lyrics:

[Måneskin]
Put your loving hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
Ridin' high, when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you want me then
But easy come and easy go
And it would end

So, any time I need ya, let me go
Yah, any time I feed you, get me? No
Any time I see you, let me know
But I planted that seed, just let me grow
I'm on my knees while I'm beggin'
'Cause I don't want to lose you
Hey yeah, ratatata

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
And put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
And put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I need you to understand
Tried so hard to be your man
The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

An empty shell
I used to be
The shadow of my life
Was hangin over me
A broken man
But I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance
To win my soul

[Måneskin]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?
What about 'em, why the basement?
Why we got good shit, don't embrace it?
Why the feel for the need to replace me?
You on a runway track from the good
I want to paint in the pictures any way we could, react
Like the heart in a trash where you should
You done gave it away, ya' had it till you took it back
But I keep walkin' on
Keep rockin' dawns
Keep walking forward
Now the court is yours
Keep browsin' halls
'Cause I don't wanna live in a broken home
Girl I'm beggin'

[Måneskin]
Mhh ye-e-e-ah
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I'm fightin' hard
To hold my own
Just can't make it all alone
I'm holdin' on
I can't fall back
I'm just a con about to fade to black

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
Put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out

Måneskin Beggin',
Beggin' Lyrics,

Yah any time I feed you get me? No,
Any time I see you let me know,
But I planted that seed just let me grow,
I'm on my knees while I'm beggin’,
'Cause I don't want to lose you,
Hey yeah ratatata

snippet.title: Anuv Jain - HUSN (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👑 Anuv Jain - HUSN (Lyrics)
🔥 Help us reach 50,000 subscribers!
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

🎧 Stream & Download: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqblNsNnUtZU5GdmtNV25pRFZ0TGl1emxkWG1Cd3xBQ3Jtc0tsYV9IMXFRZWh4Q0hQeHprR3NYRVFKU3pHcjF4TU5iWHZnLTl0bmRQMUx6SUd0SzdwUFp1RU9HSG02MVZNVkNQY3dlbkIxdlNxWUFzb0V3M0J5a0c5cmRZWXlkMlRPQlNkNFRtWGxRN2hodXVZaEhtVQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fanuvjain.lnk.to%2FHusn&v=0IIJxkDtkHY

✨ Follow Anuv Jain:


×=×=×=×=×  

Lyrics for "Anuv Jain - HUSN"

Dekho Dekho
Kaisi baatein yahan ki
Hain saath par
Hain saath na bhi
Kya itni aasaan hain?

Dekho Dekho 
Jaise mere iraaday
Waise kahaan 
Tere yahan the
Haan kitni naadan main

Mere husn ke ilawa
Kabhi dil bhi maang lo na
Haye pal mein 
Main pighal jaun haan 

Ab aisa na karo
Ke dil judna paye wapis
Teri baaton
Se bikhar jaun haan

Mana zamana hai deewana
Isilye tune na jana 
Tere liye main 
Kaafi hoon 

Dekho Dekho 
Yeh zamane se thak kar 
Atey ho kyun masoom ban kar?
Tere liye main 
Kya hi hoon?

Phir aatey kyun yahan
Karne aankhon mein 
Ho baarish?
Ab aye 
Toh theher jao na

Aur poocho na zara 
Mere din ke bare mein bhi
Bas itne mein 
Sambhal jaun haan 

Haan ek din 
Kabhi koi 
Jab bhi padhe 
Kahani teri

Lagta mujhe
Mere naam ka 
Zikr kahin 
Bhi hoga nahin

Haan 
Main yahin 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Dekho yeh dil ka haal kya 
Hothon se hota na bayan 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Kaisa naseeb hai mera
Milke bhi na mujhe mila 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Teri adhuri si wafa 
Maangu main maangu aur na 
Meri yeh aankhon mein 
Aankhon mein toh dekho 

Dekho Dekho
Kaisi kheenchi lakeerein
Chahe bhi dil toh bhi na jeete
Main iss daud mein nahin

Dekho Dekho 
Kaisi baatein yahan ki 
Baatein yahi dekhoon jahan bhi 
Main is daur se nahin

×=×=×=×=×

🏷️Tags
#husn #anuvjain #loksangeet #hindi #husnlyrics

📧 Contact/Submission: loksangeetwork@gmail.com

snippet.title: Playing Free Fire 2018 in 2026 😭
snippet.description:
Guys, is video ka motive sirf aap sabko purane time ki nostalgia feel karwana hai — un sab cheezon ki yaad dilani hai jo ab game ke andar nahi rahi.

Jo old players hain, unke liye ye video ekdum next level hone wala hai, full memories wali feeling aayegi ❤️
Aur jo new players hain, unhe bhi pata chalega ki pehle Free Fire kaisa hua karta tha.

Toh video ko end tak zaroor dekhna, enjoy karna…🔥
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#matchmaking #bronzl #freefire 
#rankpush  #satvik   
#garenafreefire #csrank 
#freefiremax #freefire

#oldpeak

snippet.title: I Went Broke Upgrading @deMysterio FC MOBILE Squad!
snippet.description:
📩 Business Inquiries → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

I lost a challenge to De Mysterio, and my punishment was brutal: I had to spend my OWN money to upgrade his FC Mobile account! 😭 I loaded up 45,000 FC Points ($400), 10 Billion Coins, and 10,000 Rank-Up tokens to take his squad from trash to a 123 OVR TOTS God Squad.

THE UPGRADE:
His pack luck was absolutely terrible, but we managed to secure loads of TOTS and we broke the bank for Erling Haaland and Bruno Fernandes!

De Mysterio set the targets for the RkGang today:

- Smash 15,000 LIKES! 📈
- 2,000 NEW SUBS! 🍀
- 1,500 COMMENTS! 💬

Can we hit his goals? Smash that subscribe button and let me know whose account I should upgrade next!

ar.title: أفلستُ بسبب ترقية فريق @deMysterio FC MOBILE!
ar.description:
📩 للاستفسارات التجارية → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

خسرتُ تحديًا أمام دي ميستيريو، وكانت عقوبتي قاسية: اضطررتُ لإنفاق أموالي الخاصة لترقية حسابه في لعبة FC Mobile! 😭 شحنتُ 45,000 نقطة FC (ما يعادل 400 دولار)، و10 مليارات عملة، و10,000 رمز ترقية لأحوّل فريقه من فريق ضعيف إلى فريق قوي بتقييم 123 من فريق الموسم.

الترقية:
كان حظه في الحصول على اللاعبين سيئًا للغاية، لكننا تمكّنا من الحصول على العديد من لاعبي فريق الموسم، وأنفقنا مبلغًا كبيرًا على إيرلينغ هالاند وبرونو فرنانديز!

حدّد دي ميستيريو أهداف فريق RkGang اليوم:

- الوصول إلى 15,000 إعجاب! 📈
- 2,000 مشترك جديد! 🍀
- 1,500 تعليق! 💬

هل نستطيع تحقيق أهدافه؟ اضغطوا على زر الاشتراك وأخبروني من ترغبون في ترقية حسابه لاحقًا!

id.title: Aku Bangkrut Karena Mengupgrade Skuad FC MOBILE @deMysterio!
id.description:
📩 Pertanyaan Bisnis → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

Aku kalah dalam tantangan melawan De Mysterio, dan hukumannya sangat brutal: Aku harus menghabiskan UANGKU SENDIRI untuk meningkatkan akun FC Mobile-nya! 😭 Aku mengisi 45.000 FC Points ($400), 10 Miliar Koin, dan 10.000 token Rank-Up untuk meningkatkan skuadnya dari yang biasa-biasa saja menjadi Skuad Dewa TOTS 123 OVR.

PENINGKATANNYA:
Keberuntungannya dalam membuka paket sangat buruk, tetapi kami berhasil mendapatkan banyak TOTS dan kami berhasil mendapatkan Erling Haaland dan Bruno Fernandes!

De Mysterio menetapkan target untuk RkGang hari ini:

- Raih 15.000 LIKE! 📈
- 2.000 PELANGGAN BARU! 🍀
- 1.500 KOMENTAR! 💬

Bisakah kita mencapai tujuannya? Tekan tombol berlangganan dan beri tahu saya akun siapa yang harus saya tingkatkan selanjutnya!

de-DE.title: Ich bin pleite gegangen, als ich mein @deMysterio FC MOBILE-Team aufgerüstet habe!
de-DE.description:
📩 Geschäftliche Anfragen → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

Ich habe eine Herausforderung gegen De Mysterio verloren, und meine Strafe war brutal: Ich musste mein EIGENES Geld ausgeben, um seinen FC Mobile-Account aufzuwerten! 😭 Ich habe 45.000 FC-Punkte (400 $), 10 Milliarden Münzen und 10.000 Rangaufstiegsmarken investiert, um sein Team von einem absoluten Schrotthaufen zu einem 123 GES TOTS-Gott-Team zu machen.

DAS UPGRADE: Er hatte absolut kein Glück mit den Packs, aber wir haben es geschafft, uns massenhaft TOTS-Spieler zu sichern und haben für Erling Haaland und Bruno Fernandes richtig tief in die Tasche gegriffen!

De Mysterio hat heute die Ziele für die RkGang festgelegt:

- 15.000 LIKES! 📈
- 2.000 NEUE ABONNENTEN! 🍀
- 1.500 KOMMENTARE! 💬

Schaffen wir seine Ziele? Abonniert meinen Kanal und sagt mir, wessen Account ich als Nächstes upgraden soll!

ja.title: @deMysterio FC MOBILE チームのアップグレードで破産しました！
ja.description:
📩 ビジネスに関するお問い合わせ → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

De Mysterioとのチャレンジに負けてしまい、罰ゲームは過酷でした。なんと、彼のFC Mobileアカウントを自分のお金でアップグレードしなければならなかったのです！😭 45,000 FCポイント（400ドル相当）、100億コイン、そして10,000ランクアップトークンを投入し、彼のチームをゴミ同然の状態から総合値123のTOTS最強チームへと育て上げました。

アップグレード：
彼のパック運は最悪でしたが、TOTS選手を大量に確保し、アーリング・ハーランドとブルーノ・フェルナンデス獲得のために大金を投じました！

De Mysterioが今日のRkGangの目標を設定しました：

- いいね！15,000件達成！📈
- 新規登録者2,000人！🍀
- コメント1,500件！ 💬

彼の目標達成できるかな？ぜひチャンネル登録ボタンを押して、次に誰のアカウントをアップグレードしてほしいか教えてください！

fr-FR.title: J'ai tout dépensé pour améliorer mon équipe mobile @deMysterio FC !
fr-FR.description:
📩 Demandes commerciales → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

J'ai perdu un défi contre De Mysterio, et la punition a été terrible : j'ai dû dépenser MON AMI pour améliorer son compte FC Mobile ! 😭 J'ai dépensé 45 000 points FC (400 $), 10 milliards de pièces et 10 000 jetons de passage en rang pour transformer son équipe, qui était nulle, en une équipe TOTS divine de niveau 123.

L'AMÉLIORATION :

Il n'a pas eu de chance avec les packs, mais on a réussi à obtenir plein de joueurs TOTS et on a dépensé une fortune pour Erling Haaland et Bruno Fernandes !

De Mysterio a fixé les objectifs de la RkGang aujourd'hui :

- 15 000 J'AIME ! 📈
- 2 000 NOUVEAUX ABONNÉS ! 🍀
- 1 500 COMMENTAIRES ! 💬

Peut-on atteindre ses objectifs ? Abonnez-vous et dites-moi quel compte je devrais mettre à jour ensuite !

hi.title: मैंने @deMysterio FC MOBILE स्क्वाड को अपग्रेड करने में सारा पैसा खर्च कर दिया!
hi.description:
📩 व्यावसायिक पूछताछ → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

मैं डी मिस्टेरियो से एक चैलेंज हार गया, और मुझे कड़ी सजा मिली: मुझे उसके एफसी मोबाइल अकाउंट को अपग्रेड करने के लिए अपने खुद के पैसे खर्च करने पड़े! 😭 मैंने 45,000 एफसी पॉइंट्स ($400), 10 बिलियन कॉइन्स और 10,000 रैंक-अप टोकन लोड किए, ताकि उसकी टीम को एकदम बेकार से 123 OVR TOTS गॉड स्क्वाड में बदल सकूं।

अपग्रेड:
उसकी पैक लक बिल्कुल खराब थी, लेकिन हम ढेर सारे TOTS प्लेयर्स हासिल करने में कामयाब रहे और हमने एर्लिंग हालैंड और ब्रूनो फर्नांडेस के लिए खूब पैसे खर्च किए!

डी मिस्टेरियो ने आज RkGang के लिए ये लक्ष्य रखे:

- 15,000 लाइक्स! 📈
- 2,000 नए सब्सक्राइबर्स! 🍀
- 1,500 कमेंट्स! 💬

क्या हम उसके लक्ष्य हासिल कर सकते हैं? सब्सक्राइब बटन दबाएं और मुझे बताएं कि मुझे अगला अकाउंट किसका अपग्रेड करना चाहिए!

📺 मेरे अन्य चैनल देखें:

⚽ खिलाड़ी और क्लब आधारित FC मोबाइल कंटेंट → https://www.youtube.com/@RkReddy2.0

ml.description:

ഡി മിസ്റ്റീരിയോയോടുള്ള ഒരു വെല്ലുവിളിയിൽ ഞാൻ പരാജയപ്പെട്ടു, അതിനുള്ള ശിക്ഷ ക്രൂരമായിരുന്നു: അവന്റെ FC മൊബൈൽ അക്കൗണ്ട് അപ്‌ഗ്രേഡ് ചെയ്യാൻ എനിക്ക് എന്റെ സ്വന്തം പണം ചെലവഴിക്കേണ്ടി വന്നു! 😭 അവന്റെ സ്ക്വാഡിനെ ട്രാഷിൽ നിന്ന് 123 OVR TOTS ഗോഡ് സ്ക്വാഡിലേക്ക് കൊണ്ടുപോകാൻ ഞാൻ 45,000 FC പോയിന്റുകൾ ($400), 10 ബില്യൺ നാണയങ്ങൾ, 10,000 റാങ്ക്-അപ്പ് ടോക്കണുകൾ എന്നിവ ലോഡ് ചെയ്തു.

അപ്‌ഗ്രേഡ്:

അദ്ദേഹത്തിന്റെ പായ്ക്ക് ഭാഗ്യം വളരെ ഭയാനകമായിരുന്നു, പക്ഷേ ഞങ്ങൾക്ക് ധാരാളം TOTS നേടാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞു, എർലിംഗ് ഹാലൻഡിനും ബ്രൂണോ ഫെർണാണ്ടസിനും ഞങ്ങൾ വിജയം നേടി!

ഡി മിസ്റ്റീരിയോ ഇന്ന് RkGang-നുള്ള ലക്ഷ്യങ്ങൾ വെച്ചു:

- 15,000 ലൈക്കുകൾ തകർക്കുക! 📈
- 2,000 പുതിയ സബ്‌സുകൾ! 🍀
- 1,500 കമന്റുകൾ! 💬

നമുക്ക് അവന്റെ ലക്ഷ്യത്തിലെത്താൻ കഴിയുമോ? ആ സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബ് ബട്ടൺ അമർത്തി, അടുത്തതായി ആരുടെ അക്കൗണ്ട് അപ്‌ഗ്രേഡ് ചെയ്യണമെന്ന് എന്നെ അറിയിക്കൂ!

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Robloxとは？Robloxは、あらゆる年齢の子どもたちが安全に交流し、創造し、楽しみ、学ぶことができるオンラインの仮想空間とワークショップです。 ROBLOXのユニークな点は、ほぼすべてのものがコミュニティのメンバーによって設計および構築されていることです。ROBLOXは13歳から18歳向けに設計されていますが、あらゆる年齢の人が利用できます。各プレイヤーはまずアバターを選択し、アイデンティティを設定します。その後、ROBLOXを探索し、チャット、ゲーム、クリエイティブなプロジェクトでのコラボレーションなどを通じて他のプレイヤーと交流できます。各プレイヤーには、未開発の仮想土地と、ナビゲーション可能な超高層ビル、実際に動くヘリコプター、巨大なピンボールマシン、マルチプレイヤーの「キャプチャー・ザ・フラッグ」ゲーム、あるいはまだ誰も想像もしていないような創造物など、あらゆるものを設計および構築するための仮想ツールボックスが与えられます。この最初の仮想土地は無料です。ROBLOXメンバーは、参加して素晴らしいものを制作することで、特別なバッジやROBLOXドル（「Robux」）を獲得できます。彼らはオンラインカタログで、アバターの服やアクセサリー、プレミアム建築資材、インタラクティブなコンポーネント、動作するメカニズムなどを購入できます。

Was ist Roblox? Roblox ist ein virtueller Online-Spielplatz und eine Werkstatt, in der Kinder jeden Alters sicher interagieren, kreativ sein, Spaß haben und lernen können. Das Besondere an ROBLOX ist, dass praktisch alles von Mitgliedern der Community entworfen und gebaut wird. ROBLOX ist zwar für 13- bis 18-Jährige gedacht, steht aber allen Altersgruppen offen. Jeder Spieler beginnt mit der Auswahl eines Avatars und gibt ihm eine Identität. Anschließend können sie ROBLOX erkunden und mit anderen chatten, Spiele spielen oder gemeinsam an kreativen Projekten arbeiten. Jeder Spieler erhält außerdem ein eigenes, unbebautes Grundstück sowie eine virtuelle Werkzeugkiste, mit der er alles Mögliche entwerfen und bauen kann – sei es ein begehbarer Wolkenkratzer, ein funktionierender Hubschrauber, ein riesiger Flipperautomat, ein Multiplayer-„Capture the Flag“-Spiel oder eine andere, noch nie dagewesene Kreation. Das erste virtuelle Grundstück ist kostenlos. Durch die Teilnahme und das Erstellen cooler Inhalte können ROBLOX-Mitglieder spezielle Abzeichen und ROBLOX-Dollar („Robux“) verdienen. Damit können sie im Online-Katalog Avatar-Kleidung und -Accessoires sowie Premium-Baumaterialien, interaktive Komponenten und funktionierende Mechanismen kaufen.

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX — berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun — baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

#Roblox #foltyn

Що таке Roblox? ROBLOX — це віртуальний онлайн-майстерня та майстерня, де діти різного віку можуть безпечно взаємодіяти, творити, розважатися та навчатися. Він унікальний тим, що практично все в ROBLOX розроблено та побудовано членами спільноти. ROBLOX розроблений для дітей віком від 13 до 18 років, але відкритий для людей будь-якого віку. Кожен гравець починає з вибору аватара та надання йому ідентичності. Потім вони можуть досліджувати ROBLOX — взаємодіяти з іншими через чат, ігри або співпрацювати над творчими проектами. Кожному гравцеві також надається власний шматок незабудованої нерухомості разом із віртуальним набором інструментів, за допомогою якого можна проектувати та будувати що завгодно — будь то хмарочос, яким можна керувати, робочий гелікоптер, гігантський пінбольний автомат, багатокористувацька гра «Захоплення прапора» чи якесь інше, ще не вигадане творіння. Ця перша ділянка віртуальної землі безкоштовна. Беручи участь та будуючи круті речі, учасники ROBLOX можуть заробляти спеціальні значки, а також долари ROBLOX («Robux»). У свою чергу, вони можуть купувати одяг та аксесуари для аватарів в онлайн-каталозі, а також преміальні будівельні матеріали, інтерактивні компоненти та робочі механізми.


#Roblox #foltyn

Chaque joueur reçoit également son propre terrain virtuel non aménagé, ainsi qu'une boîte à outils virtuelle pour concevoir et construire tout ce qu'il souhaite : un gratte-ciel navigable, un hélicoptère fonctionnel, un flipper géant, un jeu multijoueur de « Capture du drapeau » ou toute autre création encore inimaginée. Ce premier terrain virtuel est gratuit. En participant et en créant des choses originales, les membres de ROBLOX peuvent gagner des badges spéciaux et des ROBLOX dollars (« Robux »). Ils peuvent ensuite utiliser ces Robux pour acheter des vêtements et des accessoires pour leur avatar, ainsi que des matériaux de construction premium, des composants interactifs et des mécanismes fonctionnels.

Roblox क्या है? ROBLOX एक ऑनलाइन वर्चुअल प्लेग्राउंड और वर्कशॉप है, जहाँ सभी उम्र के बच्चे सुरक्षित रूप से एक-दूसरे से जुड़ सकते हैं, कुछ नया बना सकते हैं, मज़े कर सकते हैं और सीख सकते हैं। ROBLOX की खासियत यह है कि इस पर लगभग सब कुछ समुदाय के सदस्यों द्वारा ही डिज़ाइन और निर्मित किया जाता है। ROBLOX 13 से 18 वर्ष की आयु के लोगों के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया है, लेकिन यह सभी उम्र के लोगों के लिए खुला है। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी एक अवतार चुनकर और उसे एक पहचान देकर शुरुआत करता है। फिर वे ROBLOX को एक्सप्लोर कर सकते हैं - दूसरों के साथ चैट करके, गेम खेलकर या रचनात्मक परियोजनाओं पर सहयोग करके बातचीत कर सकते हैं। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी को एक अविकसित वर्चुअल ज़मीन का टुकड़ा और एक वर्चुअल टूलबॉक्स भी दिया जाता है, जिससे वे कुछ भी डिज़ाइन और निर्माण कर सकते हैं - चाहे वह चलने-फिरने योग्य गगनचुंबी इमारत हो, एक चलता-फिरता हेलीकॉप्टर हो, एक विशाल पिनबॉल मशीन हो, एक मल्टीप्लेयर "कैप्चर द फ्लैग" गेम हो या कोई अन्य, अभी तक कल्पना भी न की गई रचना। इस पहले वर्चुअल ज़मीन के टुकड़े के लिए कोई कीमत नहीं है। भाग लेकर और शानदार चीज़ें बनाकर, ROBLOX सदस्य विशेष बैज और ROBLOX डॉलर ("Robux") कमा सकते हैं। बदले में, वे ऑनलाइन कैटलॉग से अवतार के कपड़े और एक्सेसरीज़ के साथ-साथ प्रीमियम निर्माण सामग्री, इंटरैक्टिव कंपोनेंट और काम करने वाले मैकेनिज़्म खरीद सकते हैं।

Roblox란 무엇일까요? Roblox는 모든 연령대의 아이들이 안전하게 소통하고, 만들고, 즐기고, 배울 수 있는 온라인 가상 놀이터이자 작업 공간입니다. ROBLOX는 거의 모든 콘텐츠를 커뮤니티 회원들이 직접 디자인하고 제작한다는 점에서 독특합니다. ROBLOX는 13세에서 18세 사이의 사용자를 위해 설계되었지만, 모든 연령대의 사람들이 이용할 수 있습니다. 모든 플레이어는 아바타를 선택하고 자신만의 정체성을 부여하는 것으로 시작합니다. 그런 다음 ROBLOX를 탐험하며 다른 사용자와 채팅하고, 게임을 플레이하고, 창의적인 프로젝트를 공동 작업하는 등 다양한 방식으로 소통할 수 있습니다. 각 플레이어에게는 개발되지 않은 가상 토지와 가상 도구 상자가 제공되어 무엇이든 디자인하고 만들 수 있습니다. 실제로 움직일 수 있는 고층 빌딩, 작동하는 헬리콥터, 거대한 핀볼 기계, 멀티플레이어 "깃발 뺏기" 게임, 또는 아직 상상조차 하지 못한 창작물까지 만들어낼 수 있습니다. 이 첫 번째 가상 토지는 무료로 제공됩니다. ROBLOX 회원들은 참여하고 멋진 작품을 만들면서 특별 배지와 ROBLOX 달러("Robux")를 획득할 수 있습니다. 획득한 Robux로는 온라인 카탈로그에서 아바타 의상과 액세서리, 프리미엄 건축 자재, 상호 작용 구성 요소, 작동 메커니즘 등을 구매할 수 있습니다.

Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny kawałek niezagospodarowanej nieruchomości wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może projektować i budować cokolwiek — czy to nawigowalny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Capture the Flag” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, creëren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor jongeren van 13 tot 18 jaar, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen – of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Что такое Roblox? ROBLOX — это онлайн-виртуальная игровая площадка и мастерская, где дети всех возрастов могут безопасно общаться, творить, развлекаться и учиться. Его уникальность заключается в том, что практически всё в ROBLOX создаётся и разрабатывается членами сообщества. ROBLOX предназначен для подростков от 13 до 18 лет, но открыт для людей всех возрастов. Каждый игрок начинает с выбора аватара и присвоения ему имени. Затем он может исследовать ROBLOX — взаимодействовать с другими, общаясь в чате, играя в игры или сотрудничая над творческими проектами. Каждому игроку также предоставляется собственный участок необработанной виртуальной земли вместе с виртуальным набором инструментов, с помощью которого можно проектировать и строить что угодно — будь то небоскрёб, по которому можно перемещаться, работающий вертолёт, гигантский пинбол, многопользовательская игра «Захват флага» или какое-либо другое, ещё не придуманное творение. Первый участок виртуальной земли предоставляется бесплатно. Участвуя и создавая интересные вещи, участники ROBLOX могут зарабатывать специальные значки, а также виртуальную валюту ROBLOX («Robux»). В свою очередь, они могут просматривать онлайн-каталог, чтобы приобрести одежду и аксессуары для аватаров, а также премиальные строительные материалы, интерактивные компоненты и рабочие механизмы.

എന്താണ് റോബ്‌ലോക്സ്? എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള കുട്ടികൾക്ക് സുരക്ഷിതമായി ഇടപഴകാനും സൃഷ്ടിക്കാനും ആസ്വദിക്കാനും പഠിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു ഓൺലൈൻ വെർച്വൽ കളിസ്ഥലവും വർക്ക്‌ഷോപ്പുമാണ് ROBLOX. ROBLOX-ലെ പ്രായോഗികമായി എല്ലാം കമ്മ്യൂണിറ്റിയിലെ അംഗങ്ങൾ രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്ത് നിർമ്മിച്ചതാണ് എന്നതാണ് ഇതിന്റെ പ്രത്യേകത. ROBLOX 13 മുതൽ 18 വയസ്സ് വരെ പ്രായമുള്ളവർക്കായി രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്‌തിട്ടുണ്ടെങ്കിലും എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള ആളുകൾക്കും ഇത് തുറന്നിരിക്കുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും ഒരു അവതാർ തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്ത് അതിന് ഒരു ഐഡന്റിറ്റി നൽകുന്നതിലൂടെയാണ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത്. തുടർന്ന് അവർക്ക് ROBLOX പര്യവേക്ഷണം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയും - ചാറ്റ് ചെയ്തുകൊണ്ടോ, ഗെയിമുകൾ കളിച്ചോ, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ സൃഷ്ടിപരമായ പ്രോജക്റ്റുകളിൽ സഹകരിച്ചോ മറ്റുള്ളവരുമായി ഇടപഴകുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും അവരുടേതായ വികസിപ്പിക്കാത്ത റിയൽ എസ്റ്റേറ്റ് കഷണവും, എന്തും രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്യാനും നിർമ്മിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു വെർച്വൽ ടൂൾബോക്സും നൽകുന്നു - അത് ഒരു നാവിഗേറ്റ് ചെയ്യാവുന്ന അംബരചുംബി, പ്രവർത്തിക്കുന്ന ഹെലികോപ്റ്റർ, ഒരു ഭീമൻ പിൻബോൾ മെഷീൻ, ഒരു മൾട്ടിപ്ലെയർ "ക്യാപ്ചർ ദി ഫ്ലാഗ്" ഗെയിം അല്ലെങ്കിൽ മറ്റേതെങ്കിലും, ഇതുവരെ സ്വപ്നം കാണാത്ത സൃഷ്ടി. വെർച്വൽ ഭൂമിയുടെ ഈ ആദ്യ പ്ലോട്ടിന് യാതൊരു ചെലവുമില്ല. പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും രസകരമായ കാര്യങ്ങൾ നിർമ്മിക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും, ROBLOX അംഗങ്ങൾക്ക് സ്പെഷ്യാലിറ്റി ബാഡ്ജുകളും ROBLOX ഡോളറുകളും ("Robux") നേടാൻ കഴിയും. അതാകട്ടെ, അവതാർ വസ്ത്രങ്ങളും അനുബന്ധ ഉപകരണങ്ങളും വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് ഓൺലൈൻ കാറ്റലോഗിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങാനും പ്രീമിയം നിർമ്മാണ സാമഗ്രികൾ, സംവേദനാത്മക ഘടകങ്ങൾ, പ്രവർത്തന സംവിധാനങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ വാങ്ങാനും കഴിയും.

#Roblox #foltyn

pt-BR.title: ROBLOX CHUTE UM BLOCO DA SORTE!
pt-BR.description:
Hoje eu chutei blocos da sorte no Roblox! Assista ao vídeo completo para descobrir o que aconteceu.

Produtos: https://foltyn.shop/

Junte-se a este canal para ter acesso a benefícios:

--Redes Sociais--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grupo do Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nome no Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

O que é Roblox? ROBLOX é um playground e oficina virtual online, onde crianças de todas as idades podem interagir, criar, se divertir e aprender com segurança. O que torna o ROBLOX único é o fato de praticamente tudo nele ser projetado e construído por membros da comunidade. O ROBLOX é voltado para jovens de 13 a 18 anos, mas é aberto a pessoas de todas as idades. Cada jogador começa escolhendo um avatar e dando a ele uma identidade. Em seguida, pode explorar o ROBLOX — interagindo com outros jogadores por meio de bate-papo, jogos ou colaborando em projetos criativos. Cada jogador também recebe seu próprio terreno virtual não desenvolvido, juntamente com uma caixa de ferramentas virtual para projetar e construir qualquer coisa — seja um arranha-céu navegável, um helicóptero funcional, uma máquina de pinball gigante, um jogo multiplayer de "Capture a Bandeira" ou alguma outra criação ainda não imaginada. Não há custo para este primeiro terreno virtual. Ao participar e construir coisas legais, os membros do ROBLOX podem ganhar distintivos especiais, bem como dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Por sua vez, eles podem usar os Robux para comprar roupas e acessórios para seus avatares no catálogo online, além de materiais de construção premium, componentes interativos e mecanismos funcionais.

#Roblox #foltyn

אינסטגרם: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

טוויטר: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

מה זה רובלוקס? רובלוקס הוא מגרש משחקים וירטואלי מקוון וסדנה, שבו ילדים בכל הגילאים יכולים לתקשר, ליצור, ליהנות וללמוד בבטחה. זה ייחודי בכך שכמעט כל דבר ב-ROBLOX מתוכנן ונבנה על ידי חברי הקהילה. ROBLOX מיועד לגילאי 13 עד 18, אך פתוח לאנשים בכל הגילאים. כל שחקן מתחיל בבחירת אווטאר ומתן זהות לו. לאחר מכן הם יכולים לחקור את ROBLOX - לתקשר עם אחרים על ידי צ'אט, משחקי משחקים או שיתוף פעולה בפרויקטים יצירתיים. כל שחקן מקבל גם פיסת קרקע לא מפותחת משלו יחד עם ארגז כלים וירטואלי שבעזרתו ניתן לעצב ולבנות כל דבר - בין אם זה גורד שחקים ניווט, מסוק פעיל, מכונת פינבול ענקית, משחק מרובה משתתפים "לכידת הדגל" או יצירה אחרת שטרם הומצאה. אין עלות עבור חלקת אדמה וירטואלית ראשונה זו. על ידי השתתפות ובניית דברים מגניבים, חברי ROBLOX יכולים להרוויח תגים מיוחדים וכן דולרים של ROBLOX ("Robux"). בתורם, הם יכולים לקנות בקטלוג המקוון בגדים ואביזרים לאווטארים, כמו גם חומרי בנייה איכותיים, רכיבים אינטראקטיביים ומנגנונים פועלים.

snippet.title: IS HORA UNSTOPPABLE? 👑 FFWS NEPAL DAY 3 WATCHPARTY! 🔴
snippet.description:
HORA is currently dominating the leaderboard, but the real test starts NOW! ⚔️ In today’s Group Stage Day 3, we have giants like DRS, TGR, KTM, and PNL all in the same lobby. Their mission? To take down the table-toppers and claim the #1 spot! 📈🔥

​Will HORA maintain their lead, or will we see a new King at the top of the table today? 🧐 Join the A4 Gamer Watchparty as we witness the most intense battles and strategic gameplay in Nepal's Free Fire history! 🇳🇵🎮

​Don't forget to Like and Subscribe for the ultimate FFWS experience! #RiseToTheSummit

​📌 Featured Teams (The Challengers):
​The Leader: HORA 👑
​The Hunters: DRS, TGR, KTM, PNL, OPX, DG ⚔️
​#️⃣ Hashtags:
​#A4Gamer #FFWSNepal #Horaa #DRS #TGR #TableTop #CanTheyWin #FreeFireNepal #Watchparty #NepalEsports #RiseToTheSummit
